creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
Will Andrews <will@physics.purdue.edu> types:
> On Mon, Sep 03, 2001 at 01:35:57AM -0500, Mike Meyer (mwm@mired.org) wrote:
> > In that case, it needs to be fixed in the index target. I was
> > surprised a bit surprised to see that index used a bar "make", but
> > figured the author knew what they were doing and did it their way.
> ``a bar "make"''????
> Nothing needs to be fixed in the index target.. there is no
> problem there.

Just curious - why is "make" ok in the index target, but not in the
update target?

	<mike
